docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY SMITH, STEPHANIE M 2B LIVING, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HALEY GONZABA, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT 2B LIVING, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, STEPHANIE M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 2B LIVING, INC. SEE ATTACHMENT 1 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WU. PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE M. SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 2B LIVING, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HALEN GOZABA, PROPERTY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGRET WU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,063.45 FILED BY SMITH, STEPHANIE M AS TO DEFENDANT 2B LIVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, STEPHANIE M AS TO DEFENDANT 2B LIVING, INC.
